title: Trailer +
description: This modpack uses mods and the Bare Bones resource pack to fit the trailer style with a twist of added mods (such as Create & Nature's Spirit)
body:
## What is the purpose of this modpack?
This modpacks purpose is to recreate the style of the trailer inside of Minecraft itself, the only twist being that extra mods are included in the pack, such as Create and Nature's Spirit and many more.

Most of the textures for this Mod are from my pack [Modded Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modded-bare-bones)

If there are any issues please let me know in the discord server!
